GlobalVariables.StudyDescription: Cabazitaxel vs Mitoxantrone in mCRPC progressing after docetaxel (NCT00417079).

MetaDataVersion.Name: TROPIC Trial SDTM Metadata Specification
MetaDataVersion.Description: Metadata specification for TROPIC Phase III re-analysis SDTM datasets

ItemGroupDef.Name: AE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per adverse event

Description.TranslatedText: AE (One record per subject per adverse event)

ItemGroupDef.Name: EX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per constant exposure cycle

Description.TranslatedText: EX (One record per subject per constant exposure cycle)

ItemGroupDef.Name: CM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per medication

Description.TranslatedText: CM (One record per subject per medication)

ItemGroupDef.Name: LB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per laboratory test per visit

Description.TranslatedText: LB (One record per subject per laboratory test per visit)

ItemGroupDef.Name: DS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per disposition event

Description.TranslatedText: DS (One record per subject per disposition event)

ItemGroupDef.Name: VS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per vital sign measurement per visit

Description.TranslatedText: VS (One record per subject per vital sign measurement per visit)

ItemGroupDef.Name: LS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per lesion per assessment visit

Description.TranslatedText: LS (One record per subject per lesion per assessment visit)

ItemGroupDef.Name: PN
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per pain assessment per visit

Description.TranslatedText: PN (One record per subject per pain assessment per visit)

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per supplemental qualifier

Description.TranslatedText: SUPPDM (One record per subject per supplemental qualifier)

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPAE
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per adverse event per supplemental qualifier

Description.TranslatedText: SUPPAE (One record per subject per adverse event per supplemental qualifier)

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPEX
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per exposure cycle per supplemental qualifier

Description.TranslatedText: SUPPEX (One record per subject per exposure cycle per supplemental qualifier)

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPCM
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per medication per supplemental qualifier

Description.TranslatedText: SUPPCM (One record per subject per medication per supplemental qualifier)

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPLB
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per laboratory test per supplemental qualifier

Description.TranslatedText: SUPPLB (One record per subject per laboratory test per supplemental qualifier)

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPDS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per disposition event per supplemental qualifier

Description.TranslatedText: SUPPDS (One record per subject per disposition event per supplemental qualifier)

ItemGroupDef.Name: SUPPLS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per subject per lesion per supplemental qualifier

Description.TranslatedText: SUPPLS (One record per subject per lesion per supplemental qualifier)

ItemGroupDef.Name: TS
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per trial summary parameter

Description.TranslatedText: TS (One record per trial summary parameter)

ItemGroupDef.Name: TA
ItemGroupDef.def:Structure: One record per planned element per arm

Description.TranslatedText: TA (One record per planned element per arm)
Reported Term for the Adverse Event
Study Day of Start of Treatment
Study Day of End of Treatment
Reported Term for the Disposition Event
Result or Finding in Original Units
Planned Order of Element within Arm
